title: iria obtusangula
intro: Iria obtusangula, also known as the "Kudu Fruit" or "Eland Fruit", is a plant species native to various parts of Africa. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, making it useful in the treatment of various health conditions. The health benefits associated with Iria obtusangula include the potential to reduce inflammation, improve cardiovascular health, and aid in the management of diabetes. Traditionally, the plant's fruit is prepared as a tea or infused in oil, while its leaves can be used to make a herbal infusion, highlighting the versatility of this plant in herbal medicine.
